label: Turn Of Month
signal: Invested only the last 5 and first 5 trading days of each month, else cash.
description: Calendar effect: invested only the last N + first N trading days of each month (v2 canonical N=5/5), cash (risk-free) otherwise. Refs: Ariel (1987), Lakonishok & Smidt (1988).
reference: Lakonishok & Smidt (1988); Ariel (1987) — turn-of-month equity effect
